name: Steak & Bean Chowder
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound boneless beef sirloin steak, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
2 (14.5 oz.) cans whole tomatoes, undrained, diced
1 can (15 oz.) spicy chili beans, undrained
2 baking potatoes, unpeeled, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a nonstick Dutch oven or large saucepan with nonstick cooking spray.
2. Heat over medium-high heat until the pot is hot. Add beef; cook and stir until no longer pink.
3. Add onion; cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
4. Add all remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to medium-low. Partially cover and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
Makes 4 servings—320 calories—45 calories from fat—5 grams fat.
